title: Smoky Jamaican Jerk Chicken
description: A flavorful and spicy jerk chicken recipe with a smoky twist, perfect for a summer grill.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together jerk seasoning, allspice, and brown sugar.
Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken breasts, making sure to coat them evenly.
Let the chicken sit for 10 minutes to allow the spices to penetrate.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Meanwhile, brush the tomatoes with oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the tomatoes for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they're slightly charred.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the jerk chicken with grilled tomatoes on the side.
